---
title: "Section 6: Impact of Epsilon Choice on Model Selection"
output:
  html_document:
    toc: true
    toc_float: true
    code_folding: hide
    theme: cosmo
---

```{r setup, include=FALSE}
knitr::opts_chunk$set(echo = TRUE, warning = FALSE, message = FALSE,
                      fig.width = 10, fig.height = 7)
library(latex2exp)
library(tidyverse)
library(patchwork)
```

# Setup

Equal allocation designs with $n_i = 30, 50, 75, 100$ per area; 50 samples each.
Candidate models: Fay-Herriot with $p \in \{3, 6, 9, \ldots, 60\}$ (20 models).
$\epsilon \in \{0.1, 0.2, \ldots, 0.9\}$, $R \in \{1, 3, 5\}$ repeats.

```{r load-data}
CONFIGS <- c("equal_30", "equal_50", "equal_75", "equal_100")

# Load from new aggregated results (S=50)
results <- readRDS("../results_summary/equal_allocation_results.RDS")

dt_all <- results$dt_1fold %>%
  filter(config %in% CONFIGS, loss_function == "MSE")

oracle_all <- results$oracle %>%
  filter(config %in% CONFIGS)

# Ordered parseable facet label
label_map <- c(equal_30 = "n==30", equal_50 = "n==50", equal_75 = "n==75", equal_100 = "n==100")
add_design <- function(df) mutate(df, design = factor(label_map[config], levels = label_map))
```

# Selections

```{r selections}
# Average oracle: argmin_p mean_s MSE_s(p) per design
avg_oracle <- oracle_all %>%
  group_by(config, nbasis) %>%
  summarise(avg_mse = mean(mse_true), .groups = "drop") %>%
  group_by(config) %>%
  slice_min(avg_mse, n = 1, with_ties = FALSE) %>%
  select(config, avg_oracle_nbasis = nbasis)

cat("Average oracle by design:\n"); print(avg_oracle)

dt_sel <- dt_all %>%
  group_by(config, comp_no, epsilon, n_reps_used) %>%
  slice_min(metric, n = 1, with_ties = FALSE) %>%
  ungroup() %>%
  select(config, comp_no, epsilon, n_reps_used, dt_nbasis = nbasis) %>%
  left_join(avg_oracle, by = "config") %>%
  mutate(deviation = dt_nbasis - avg_oracle_nbasis) %>%
  add_design()
```

# Figure: RMSE and Mean Bias

```{r figure, fig.width=10, fig.height=7}
# ── (a) RMSE from average oracle by design ─────────────────────────────────
rmse_data <- dt_sel %>%
  filter(n_reps_used %in% c(1, 3, 5)) %>%
  group_by(design, epsilon, n_reps_used) %>%
  summarise(
    rmse = sqrt(mean(deviation^2)),
    se   = sd(deviation^2) / (2 * sqrt(mean(deviation^2)) * sqrt(n())),
    .groups = "drop"
  )

p_a <- ggplot(rmse_data, aes(epsilon, rmse,
                              color = factor(n_reps_used),
                              fill  = factor(n_reps_used))) +
  geom_ribbon(aes(ymin = rmse - se, ymax = rmse + se), alpha = 0.12, color = NA) +
  geom_line(linewidth = 0.8) +
  geom_point(size = 1.5) +
  facet_wrap(~ design, labeller = label_parsed, nrow = 1) +
  scale_x_continuous(breaks = c(0.3, 0.6, 0.9)) +
  scale_color_brewer(palette = "Set1", name = "R") +
  scale_fill_brewer(palette = "Set1", name = "R") +
  labs(title = "(a) RMSE from average oracle basis count",
       x = expression(epsilon),
       y = "RMSE") +
  theme_minimal() +
  theme(legend.position = "bottom",
        plot.title = element_text(size = 11, face = "bold"),
        strip.text = element_text(size = 10))

# ── (b) Mean bias by design ────────────────────────────────────────────────
bias_data <- dt_sel %>%
  filter(n_reps_used %in% c(1, 3, 5)) %>%
  group_by(design, epsilon, n_reps_used) %>%
  summarise(mean_bias = mean(deviation),
            se = sd(deviation) / sqrt(n()), .groups = "drop")

p_b <- ggplot(bias_data, aes(epsilon, mean_bias,
                              color = factor(n_reps_used),
                              fill = factor(n_reps_used))) +
  geom_hline(yintercept = 0, linewidth = 0.4, color = "gray50") +
  geom_ribbon(aes(ymin = mean_bias - se, ymax = mean_bias + se),
              alpha = 0.12, color = NA) +
  geom_line(linewidth = 0.8) +
  geom_point(size = 1.5) +
  facet_wrap(~ design, labeller = label_parsed, nrow = 1) +
  scale_x_continuous(breaks = c(0.3, 0.6, 0.9)) +
  scale_color_brewer(palette = "Set1", name = "R") +
  scale_fill_brewer(palette = "Set1", name = "R") +
  labs(title = "(b) Mean bias from average oracle basis count",
       x = expression(epsilon),
       y = "Mean Bias") +
  theme_minimal() +
  theme(legend.position = "bottom",
        plot.title = element_text(size = 11, face = "bold"),
        strip.text = element_text(size = 10))

# ── Combine ────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
fig <- (p_a / p_b) + plot_layout(guides = "collect") &
  theme(legend.position = "bottom")

fig
```

```{r save-figure, include=FALSE}
ggsave("plot4_basis.png", fig, width = 10, height = 7, dpi = 300)
```
